# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This project uses RahulOS conventions.
- Read `AGENTS.md` first.
- Then read `.agent/BOOTSTRAP.md`, `.agent/walkthrough/README.md`, `PROJECT-STATE.md`, and `PROJECT-CONTROLS.md`.
- Keep `.agent/plan/PROJECT-PACKET.md` and `.agent/plan/PHASES.md` parseable for the central approval portal.
- Approval evidence belongs in `.agent/approvals/`.
- Do not duplicate project stage outside of `PROJECT-STATE.md`.
- Run only relevant checks and report verification as defined by the project instructions.
